item.title: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Amid Stalled Peace Talks
item.description: In this episode, we cover the latest developments in the US-Iran conflict. President Donald Trump has extended the ceasefire, citing a 'seriously fractured' Iranian leadership, while directing the military to continue the naval blockade. We break down the disarray surrounding the planned peace talks in Pakistan, Iran's refusal to negotiate under the threat of a blockade, and the escalating maritime tensions over seized vessels and disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz.
item.dc:creator: ACDT
item.itunes:summary: In this episode, we cover the latest developments in the US-Iran conflict. President Donald Trump has extended the ceasefire, citing a 'seriously fractured' Iranian leadership, while directing the military to continue the naval blockade. We break down the disarray surrounding the planned peace talks in Pakistan, Iran's refusal to negotiate under the threat of a blockade, and the escalating maritime tensions over seized vessels and disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz.
